'''Una Clan''' or '''House Una''' was a famous [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] family on [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]]. Among its members were [[Komad Fortuna]], during the [[Jedi Civil War]], as well as [[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]] and [[Ob Fortuna]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. "Una" meant "graceful" in [[Twi'leki/Legends|Twi'leki]].
